entities.name: CROP BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A sustainable and cost-effective strategy to address malnutrition by increasing the micronutrient density of staple food crops

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of nutrient deficiency prevalent in developing countries

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where crop biofortification is implemented to address malnutrition

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Staple food crops targeted for micronutrient density enhancement

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Staple food crops targeted for micronutrient density enhancement

entities.name: NATURAL GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Genetic diversity exploited through breeding and technology to develop nutrient-dense cultivars

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: A traditional method used to develop micronutrient-dense crop cultivars

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A biotechnological method used to develop micronutrient-dense crop cultivars

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with specific seed nutrients

entities.name: SEED IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient trait targeted for enhancement in staple crops

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient trait targeted for enhancement in staple crops

entities.name: SEED PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A nutrient trait mapped in common bean, rice, and wheat

entities.name: SEED PHYTATE
entities.description: A nutrient trait mapped in common bean, rice, and wheat

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used for biofortification and QTL mapping of iron, zinc, phosphorus, and phytate

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop used for biofortification and QTL mapping of iron, zinc, phosphorus, and phytate

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop used for biofortification and QTL mapping of iron, zinc, phosphorus, and phytate

entities.name: IRON REDUCTASE QTL
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus associated with seed-iron in common bean

entities.name: PHYTIC ACID SYNTHESIS
entities.description: A biological process involved in nutrient availability, with candidate enzymes mapped in common bean

entities.name: IPA
entities.description: Candidate genes that co-segregate with mutant phenotypes in rice and soybean

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop where IPA candidate genes were identified

entities.name: GPE-B1 LOCUS
entities.description: A genetic locus in wild emmer wheat that accelerates senescence and increases nutrient remobilization

entities.name: WILD EMMER WHEAT
entities.description: A wheat species containing the Gpe-B1 locus

entities.name: SENESCENCE
entities.description: The biological process of plant aging, affected by Gpe-B1 and TtNAM-B1

entities.name: NUTRIENT REMOBILIZATION
entities.description: The process of moving nutrients from leaves to developing seeds, affected by Gpe-B1 and TtNAM-B1

entities.name: TTNAM-B1
entities.description: A cloned gene that affects senescence and nutrient remobilization

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: A region where seed iron-dense common bean and rice are developed

entities.name: EASTERN AND SOUTHERN AFRICA
